entries.en-US:
---
name: charts
description: Chart and data visualization patterns for Remotion. Use when creating bar charts, pie charts, histograms, progress bars, or any data-driven animations.
metadata:
  tags: charts, data, visualization, bar-chart, pie-chart, graphs
---
entries.zh-Hans:
---
name: charts
description: Remotion的图表和数据可视化模式。适用于创建条形图、饼图、直方图、进度条或任何数据驱动的动画。
metadata:
  tags: charts, data, visualization, bar-chart, pie-chart, graphs
---

entries.en-US: You can create bar charts in Remotion by using regular React code - HTML and SVG is allowed, as well as D3.js.
entries.zh-Hans: 你可以使用常规的 React 代码在 Remotion 中创建条形图——允许使用 HTML 和 SVG，也可以使用 D3.js。

entries.en-US:
Disable all animations by third party libraries.
They will cause flickering during rendering.
Instead, drive all animations from `useCurrentFrame()`.
entries.zh-Hans:
禁用所有第三方库的动画。
它们会在渲染过程中导致闪烁。
相反，所有动画都应通过 `useCurrentFrame()` 来驱动。

entries.en-US: See [Bar Chart Example](assets/charts/bar-chart.tsx) for a basic example implmentation.
entries.zh-Hans: 查看 [条形图示例](assets/charts/bar-chart.tsx) 了解一个基本的示例实现。

entries.en-US: You can animate the height of the bars and stagger them like this:
entries.zh-Hans: 你可以像这样为条形的高度设置动画并使其交错出现：

entries.en-US: Animate segments using stroke-dashoffset, starting from 12 o'clock.
entries.zh-Hans: 使用 stroke-dashoffset 为扇区设置动画，从 12 点钟方向开始。
